summary: All 8 frontend tests passed. Homepage anchor links (#pricing, #reviews) work correctly with scroll. Admin login works with provided credentials. CMS Dashboard loads properly after authentication, displays 6 service pages from API, and has correct navigation links.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features tested and working: (1) /#pricing scrolls to pricing section (scrollY > 200), (2) /#reviews scrolls to reviews section (scrollY > 200), (3) / without hash starts at top, (4) Admin login at /admin works with admin/Admin152345, (5) Sidebar contains 'CMS / Контент' link to /admin/cms, (6) /admin/cms loads CMS Dashboard without redirect, (7) CMS Dashboard displays 6 service pages from API, (8) CMS header has 'Админ-панель' link back to /admin. Token key mismatch fix (admin_token -> adminToken) verified working.

test_results.admin_link_in_cms: PASS - 'Админ-панель' link found in CMS header
